venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner with open-seating service. Daily-changing menus of contemporary and classic dishes; complimentary caviar available on request at dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant aft. Buffet with live cooking stations for breakfast and lunch; themed à la carte dinner service each evening highlighting regional cuisine of ports of call. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Patio Grill
venues.description: Poolside deck venue serving casual lunch — salads, artisanal pizza, burgers, grilled specialties, and light bites in an alfresco setting. Complimentary.

venues.name: Earth & Ocean at The Patio
venues.description: The Patio transforms each evening (7–9 pm) into a candlelit à la carte restaurant. Eclectic world flavors by consulting Chef Anton Egger; menu celebrates global ingredients. Reservations recommended. Complimentary.

venues.name: Solis
venues.description: Seabourn's signature specialty fine-dining restaurant, first opened on Seabourn Quest on January 20, 2024 (replacing The Grill by Thomas Keller, which had debuted here in May 2016). Mediterranean-inspired cuisine by Master Chef Anton Egger — light, colorful, handcrafted dishes. Dinner only; reservations required (one booking per guest per 7-day voyage). Complimentary.

venues.name: Sushi in The Club
venues.description: Evening sushi service offered within The Club lounge (6–9 pm), not a standalone restaurant. Fresh fish imported from Japan; maki rolls, sashimi, nigiri, caviar, and small plates. Complimentary.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: The social hub — freshly roasted specialty coffees, handmade gelato, pastries, sandwiches, and light snacks throughout the day. Complimentary.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. Full Restaurant menu served course-by-course during dinner hours; dedicated menus for breakfast, lunch, and snacks throughout the day.
